### 1. MARKET OVERVIEW
The overall market is predominantly in a distribution phase, with most tokens showing negative net buying pressure (NBP) and being in the distribution phase. Notable shifts include phase changes in DRB and VVV, with DRB moving from consolidation to distribution and VVV changing from distribution to consolidation.

### 2. PRICE & VOLUME HIGHLIGHTS
No significant price or volume movements were observed for any token, with all price and volume deltas being 0%. However, notable changes in NBP include a 25% increase for BUNKER, a 16.7% increase for WORK, and an 11.8% increase for Lumen.
